title: United Nation Three Decades of Drum & Bass
original_title: United Nation: Three Decades of Drum & Bass
overview: EDM was born out of the Drum and Bass movement, which began in the early 1990's. The scene and its many style permutations have survived and thrived, and heavily influences Grime and the modern EDM arena.
